title: Skyblock Evolved
description: Tired of setting up a Skyblock world? This modpack is done and ready!
body:
# Skyblock Evolved
**_Where Skyblock creates an adventure!_**

![Isometric render of a skyblock island using the barebones texturepack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e137809ab1cb3a29e1ce10055519e5e1f02cd1cf.png)


## How to use
**Simply download the modpack, install it on the Modrinth app and you're done! The islands will automatically generate for you to enjoy!**

## Features


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- FPS improving mods
- Main Skyblock island generation
- Extra sand island generation
- Advancements to guide your way through Skyblock
- Extra islands???

</details>


## DISCLAIMER



This project may have unforseen glitches or bugs. Any mod could stop working at any point, which I may or may not be able to fix.

If you plan on using this Modpack as a base for any server, youtube video or livestream, please credit me, thank you!
